dict.string: AgentOS uses the microphone for continuous ambient listening with the "Hey AgentOS" wake phrase. Speech recognition runs on-device.
AgentOS uses on-device speech recognition to process your voice commands. No audio data is sent to Apple servers without your consent.
AgentOS reads your calendar to surface meeting information and schedule events on your behalf.
AgentOS needs full calendar access to read events and create new meetings for you.
AgentOS syncs your Reminders tasks into the unified task view.
AgentOS needs full Reminders access to create and complete tasks on your behalf.
AgentOS reads your contacts to identify people in your email, calendar, and tasks.
